obs: User went for 30-minute walk/jog Saturday morning. Wants to wake up before 10 am on weekends consistently.
Struggling with screen time on Sundays; wants tips to cut down.
Wants to prioritize reading more on weekends; many competing distractions.
Plans: exercise Saturday/Sunday mornings, reading time, meal prep Sundays.
User and mom shopped for family outfits two weeks ago (around May 16). User got yellow shirt and white pants.
Looking for shoes to match yellow shirt/white pants. Prefers neutral beige or light gray. Brands recommended: Clarks, Vans.
User and siblings performed musical number at reunion in matching outfits. Photos taken.
Considering gift for mom for helping pick outfits. Interested in personalized jewelry or photo album.
Booked flight to Colorado yesterday for week-long backpacking trip to Rocky Mountain National Park.
Needs waterproof jacket for high-elevation hiking. Recommended: The North Face Venture 2, Patagonia Tres 3-in-1 Parka (20,000mm+ rating).
Considering water filter/tablets. Recommended filters: Sawyer Mini (2oz), MSR TrailShot (3oz), Katadyn Hiker.
Wants small daypack for day hikes. Recommended: Osprey Talon 11 (1.3lbs, 11L), Salomon Agile 10, Arc'teryx Beta AR 10.
Needs maps for Rocky Mountain NP. Recommended: NPS map, Trails Illustrated #200, USGS topos.
Asked about bear safety. Must store food 10 ft high, 4 ft from trunk; travel in 3+ groups; carry bear spray.
Creating sunset beach-inspired art. Color palette: burnt sienna, golden brown, coral pink, warm orange.
Working on abstract ocean sculpture at home (5-6 hours so far). Wants weathered driftwood effect.
Interested in ceramic glazing. Resources: Ceramic Arts Network, YouTube (Sculpture School, ClayShare).
Experimenting with resin for translucent ocean effect. Recommended: Epoxy/Polyurethane/Acrylic resin; use pigment powders, iridescent additives.
Received visa approval April 15. Relieved and excited.
Moving to Berkeley August 15. International student needing UC-approved health insurance.
Seeking affordable furniture for Berkeley apartment. Second-hand: Goodwill, Salvation Army, Habitat ReStore, Berkeley Flea Market.
Wants bike for campus. Shops: Berkeley Bike Church (non-profit), BikeLink, Missing Link Coop, REI Berkeley.
Bike registration needs: ID, residency proof, make/model/serial number. Berkeley PD, 2100 MLK Jr Way.
UC requires: $100K+ per accident, hospitalization, prescriptions, maternity, mental health. Can use SHIP or private.
Opening US bank account. Needs: passport, I-20, visa, address proof, student ID, SSN/ITIN.
Discussed anonymity in writing: increases credibility, protects from reprisal, enhances mystery; can limit accountability.
User likes mountains and beaches. Recommended Bali: Ubud (forest/rice), Lovina (beach), Amed (snorkel), Jimbaran (beach).
Mount Batur: active volcano, 1,717m (5,633 ft), popular sunrise hiking destination.
Repainted bedroom walls light gray last month. Significantly changed room mood.
Looking for minimalist hexagon art print in bold contrasting color for light gray walls.
Found artists (Emily Ley, Rifle Paper Co, Jennifer Bouron). Marketplaces: Society6, Etsy, Minted.
Purchased essential oil diffuser. Favorite blend: lavender and chamomile.
Recommended scents: soft florals, citrus, earthy notes. Preferred: monochromatic/single-note like lavender.
Organized closet last weekend. Seeks further optimization: purge, vertical space, multi-functional storage.
Accessories jumbled on shelf. Recommended: hat rack/stackable for hats; scarf organizer for scarves; belt rack for belts.
Top Hawaii beachfront: Four Seasons (Maui/Hualalai), Ritz-Carlton, Halekulani, Montage, St. Regis.
Interested in snorkeling and surfing. Spots: Molokini Crater, Hanauma Bay (snorkel); Waikiki, North Shore, Honolua (surf).
Cultural tours: lei making, hula lessons, luaus, historical tours, demonstrations.
Music activities: ukulele lessons, slack-key guitar, hula/ukulele concerts, cultural performances.
DNA test results: 35% Irish, 25% Italian (surprise), 20% English, 20% German.
Researching Italian ancestry. Southern regions (Campania, Apulia, Calabria, Sicily) had most emigration 1800s-1900s.
Fascinated by Amalfi Coast. Will research: Italian State Archives, census records, naturalization records.
Saw recent Marvel solo film with Emily. Light-hearted, funny. Lead actor praised. Possibly Spider-Man: No Way Home.
Planning cabin trip with high school friends in April. Seeking mountain hiking trails.
Solo hunting trip to family property in rural Wisconsin. Early archery season for whitetail deer. No harvest, but saw fresh buck rubs.
Spent 2 days in tree stand. Quality time with parents at cabin. Helped fix fence post and split firewood.
Tracking specific buck using trail camera. Good understanding of movement patterns. Scouting for rubs, scrapes, tracks.
Pre-hunt routine: arrive day or two early, visualize hunt, think strategy, order gear. Gets focused and unwinds.
Planning fishing trip to Colorado next month. Target: brown trout on Arkansas River in late fall.
Practiced casting and tying flies since fly fishing workshop in Chicago a few weeks ago.
Planning weekly dinners. Made fried rice with leftover rice, scrambled eggs, mixed veggies last Friday.
Likes rice bowl with grilled chicken and veggies idea. Will try with bell peppers, onions, mushrooms.
Made chicken tikka masala at home last weekend. Turned out well. Wants different version.
Meal prepping lunches. Options: salad jars, whole grain wraps, soups, rice bowls, mason jar pasta, stuffed peppers.
Interested in Universal Basic Income concept.
Novels about UBI: 'Utopia for Realists' (Bregman), 'Red Mars' (Robinson), 'Walkaway' (Doctorow), others.
'Walkaway' by Cory Doctorow published 2017. Features AI and post-scarcity society with UBI.

Wore Air Force Ones to park on Saturday. Muddy from park. Needs cleaning.
